__fixture__.name: self_hosted_org_install_secret_broker
__fixture__.scenario: Self-hosted org workspace installs a new dependency from a public alternate registry under a secret-broker-handle credential. The package carries a sandboxed post-install script. Lockfile gains new entries; transitive set adds two within-minor packages; rollback is via lockfile checkpoint. Apply completes clean. Validates secret-broker-handle preference, sandboxed-script disclosure, lockfile-impact and transitive-impact attribution before apply, and rollback-via-checkpoint truth.
acceptance_bullets: 1: lockfile, transitive, and rollback truth attributed before apply
2: secret-broker-handle auth preferred over raw secret
3: sandboxed script not represented as ordinary metadata update

registry_source.registry_disclosure: Public alternate registry; secret-broker handle authenticates the read.

registry_auth.auth_disclosure: Registry credential resolved through the secret broker; raw token never lives in workspace state.

script_risk.script_risk_disclosure: Post-install script runs inside the default locked-down sandbox; no unsandboxed steps are admitted on this profile.

lockfile_impact.lockfile_impact_disclosure: One new direct dependency plus two transitive entries are added; no existing entries are updated or removed.

transitive_impact.transitive_impact_disclosure: Two transitive packages added within their minor floor; no major-boundary crossings; no resolver conflicts.

rollback_posture.rollback_posture_disclosure: Rollback restores the lockfile to the prior checkpoint; sandboxed script side effects are bounded to the sandbox.

mirror_or_offline_state.mirror_or_offline_state_disclosure: Online; default origin admissible under self-hosted-org policy.

apply_outcome_note: Install completed cleanly; lockfile advanced to the proposed snapshot.

transport_posture_at_event.transport_posture_note: Self-hosted profile; org policy admits public alternate registry reads under secret-broker auth.
